description: Court record, calligraphically written, from a lawsuit about changing the configuration of the main hall of a house. During the dispute a Muslim judge was bribed. The intervention of Shemarya (b. Elhanan apparently), the rav, or highest Jewish religious authority, is requested. Dated ca. 1000. (Information from Mediterranean Society, IV, p. 84)
tags: qadi court, bribe, arkhaot shel goyim, corruption
